---
title: "Course Introduction"
subtitle: "Introduction project summary"
# use quarto markdown to 
---
## Project 0: Data Science Fundamentals & Environment Setup

This foundational project focused on establishing a robust data science development environment and applying initial data visualization concepts, serving as the technical baseline for the entire program.

### 🛠️ Technologies & Tools
* **Language:** Python
* **Environment:** Visual Studio Code (VS Code)
* **Dynamic Reporting:** Quarto & Markdown
* **Core Libraries:** Pandas (Data Handling) and Plotnine/Matplotlib (Visualization)

### 🎯 Project Objectives
* **Environment Configuration:** Prepared VS Code for professional data science programming and technical document rendering.
* **Data Exploration:** Analyzed the `penguins` dataset to understand data structures and cleaning workflows in Python.
* **Statistical Visualization:** Recreated complex charts and descriptive tables following the "Whole Game" data science workflow.
* **Reproducible Reporting:** Developed a professional HTML report using **Quarto**, integrating executable code blocks with detailed Markdown explanations.

### 📈 Key Results
* **Workflow Automation:** Successfully implemented reproducible workflows for data rendering and publishing.
* **Technical Communication:** Mastered Markdown syntax for presenting complex technical findings to stakeholders.
* **Analytical Skills:** Demonstrated proficiency in visualizing both categorical and numerical variables through scatter plots and data tables.

[MarkDown Basics](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#links-images)
